title: calamus pumilus
intro: Calamus pumilus, also known as lesser calamus, is a type of plant species within the family Zingiberaceae, native to the Himalayas and parts of India. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of calamus pumilus include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Calamus pumilus can be prepared in various forms, such as an essential oil, powder, or tea, allowing for its medicinal properties to be effectively utilized.
